titleStmt.title: SII 41.151: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 151. (A.R. No. 150 of 1905.) Veñjamāṅgūḍalūr, Karur Taluk, Tiruchirāppaḷḷi District. On the south wall of the Pannirumuḷi-Amman shrine in the Vikritisvara temple at Veñjamāṅgūḍalūr.

p.hi: Pāṇḍya. Sundara-pāṇḍya Year 3 = c. 13th-14th century A.D.

summary.p: Records that one Sundara-pāṇḍiya-dēvaṉ alias Kaṇḍiyadēvar constructed the shrine of the goddess Paṇṇēimoḻiyār with its ardhamaṇḍapa. Different parts (paḍai) of the structure were uttaram, eḻutagam, kapōtam, and viyāḷam, besides the pavement stone and the roof tile (taṭṭōḍu).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecari paṉmarāṉa tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvirapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu tiruveñcamākkūṭal Āḷuṭaiya nāya
ṉārkoyil tampirāṭṭiyār paṇṇemoḻiyār koyil Arttamaṇṭapam Uḷpaṭa Uttaram Eḻutakam kapotam viyāḷam Āka paṭainālum pākkallum tiru
vantipāvum taṭṭoṭum Iṭuvittu taḷamum Icaippicceṉ cuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṉāṉa kaṇṭiya tevar ceyvitta taṉmam§ cakatkopālaṉ§
Digital edition of SII 41.151 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
